nasb.text: Jesus presented another parable to them, saying, “The kingdom of heaven may be compared to a man who sowed good seed in his field.

esv.text: He put another parable before them, saying, “The kingdom of heaven may be compared to a man who sowed good seed in his field,

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們另外講了一個比喻，說：“天國好像人把好的種子撒在田裡。

ccb.text: 耶稣又给他们讲了一个比喻，说：“天国就像一个人，将好种子撒在田里。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们讲了另一个比喻说：“天国好比一个人把好种子撒在自己的田里。
